creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Wilke from comment #2)

This is stuck waiting until Gtk is updated to 3.20. Changes to theme support in Gtk3 mean that old themes are not forwards compatible and new themes are not backwards compatible. I prepared this update in advance so users of the theme would not loose it with the Gtk3 update, but did not expect to be waiting so long for that update. There is no urgency here given that the version of the theme in ports works with the version of Gtk3 in ports. I will commit this theme update whenever Gtk3 is finally updated.
